particulars.description: All that piece or parcel of land containing 0.68 acres or thereabouts situate nr newport rd bedwas gwent together with all fixtures from time to time therein or thereon or in or on some part thereof.

secured_details.description: Securing £32,000 or other the principal moneys not exceeding £32000DUE or to become due from the company to the welsh development agency pursuant to a loan agreement of even date and/or this charge.
